source_container_checks.name: Reference integrity
source_container_checks.details: Tag 101 firingTriggerId 201 exists; tag 101 measurementId token {{id}} matches variable name id in source; parentFolderId 401 exists for tag 101 and variable 301.

optimized_container_checks.name: Reference integrity after rename
optimized_container_checks.details: Tag 101 firingTriggerId 201 exists; tag 101 measurementId token {{CONST - GA4 Measurement ID}} matches variable name CONST - GA4 Measurement ID; folder ID 401 still exists.

optimized_container_checks.name: No delete/disable/material payload changes
optimized_container_checks.details: Entity IDs, tag type, trigger type, eventName, measurement ID constant value, folder IDs, fingerprints, and built-in variables are preserved.

warnings.message: Validation is structural and file-based only; it does not prove tracking correctness, consent behavior, legal compliance, privacy compliance, production readiness, or publish safety.
Manual review is required to confirm old names are not used as plain-text dependencies in external documentation, QA scripts, reports, or custom code.

limitations: No live GTM, GA4, Google Ads, website, workspace, or API inspection was performed.
The review is limited to the uploaded fixture JSON.
